allow: PowerShell($py = ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $py\)\) { $py = "python" }; & $py -c "import flows.common.sheets as c; from flows.galenius_flow import sheets as g; from flows.photo_carne_flow import sheets as p; from flows.dj_fut_flow import sheets as d; from flows.firma_digital_flow import sheets as f; print\('sheets OK'\); print\('public g:', sorted\(x for x in dir\(g\) if not x.startswith\('_'\)\)\)")
